info.english_meaning: to contact to touch to join to unite
info.hindI_arTa: samparka karanA sparSa karanA saMyoga karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: pfRANkti pfkte (pfNkte) samparke yO parcayati parcati ' (Slo. 51) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'vAyo tava prapfYcatI DenA jigAti dASuze' (f0 123) prapfYcatI prakarzeRa somasamparkaM kurvatI DenA vAk
'sampfcaH sTa saM mA BadreRa pfNkta' (Sa॰brA॰12.7.3.22) sampfNkta=yojayata
'druho rizaH sampfcaH pAhi sUrIn' (f॰2.35.6) sampfcaH samparkAt
'sampfca sTa saM mA BadreRa pfNkta vipfca sTa vi mA pApmanA pfNkta' (vA0 saM0 1911) vipfNkta=pfTakkuruta
'yaM (sUryam) sImakfRvan tamase vipfce' (f0 4133) tamase vipfce tamaso'paGAtAya DvAntasyApahananAya timiranirAsAya
'vIrezu vIrA~ upa pfNDi nastvam' (f0 22415) upapfNDi sampfktAnkuru pOtrAnapi laBemahItyarTa iti sAyaRaH
'upa kzatraM pfYcIta hanti rAjaBiH' (f0 1408) upapfYcIta Atmani sampfktaM kuryAt varDayediti BAvaH kzatraM balam
'upedamupaparcanamAsu gozUpa pfcyatAm' (f0 6288) upaparcanamApyAyanamiti sAyaRaH garBADAnamityanye sAmpratikAH upapfcyatAM samIpe niDIyatAm

'upennu maGavanBUya innu te dAnaM devasya pfcyate' (tE0 saM0 1422) **yajamAnasyAtyantaM samIpe sambaDyata ityarTaH yajamAnena havi rdIyata ityuktaM Bavati devasya dAtuste dAnaM yajamAnaM prati pfcyate (saMnikfzyate) ityuvawamahIDarO' (vA0 saM0 334)
